mapper.select:
SELECT m.id, m.merchant_name, m.logo, m.description, m.business_hours, m.min_delivery_amount, m.delivery_fee, m.status, m.longitude, m.latitude
, ROUND( 6371 * 2 * ASIN( SQRT( POW(SIN((#{query.latitude} - m.latitude) * PI() / 180 / 2), 2) + COS(#{query.latitude} * PI() / 180) * COS(m.latitude * PI() / 180) * POW(SIN((#{query.longitude} - m.longitude) * PI() / 180 / 2), 2) ) ), 2 ) AS distance
FROM merchant m WHERE m.audit_status = 1 AND m.status IN (1, 2)
AND m.merchant_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.name}, '%')
ORDER BY distance ASC
ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
SELECT id, merchant_name, logo, description, business_hours, min_delivery_amount, delivery_fee, status, longitude, latitude FROM merchant WHERE id = #{merchantId} AND audit_status = 1
